name: sheep-story
description: A novel writing and story cockpit plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Write fiction with proportional planning and continuity control.
interface.longDescription: SheepStory is a fiction-writing Agent Skill for proportional quick, standard, and longform workflows. It reduces continuity drift, routes canon-affecting ideas, protects authorial voice, tests conflict and reasoning, and requires outline approval when the scope warrants it.
defaultPrompt: Use sheep-story to build a World Book and Character Cards for a new story.
Use sheep-story to route these canon-affecting ideas.
Use sheep-story to review this scene without flattening its voice.
